elements.name: Description
texts: An extract from Seamus Heaney's poem 'Station Island'

elements.name: Source
texts: Heaney, Seamus, 'Station Island', in Station Island collection, VII, p. 77

elements.name: Rights
texts: Citation for the purposes of criticism

elements.name: Text
texts:
"I had come to the edge of the water,
soothed by just looking, idling over it
as if it were a clear barometer

or a mirror, when his reflection
did not appear but I sensed a presence
entering into my concentration"
